title: Must have been the Wind.
description: A mod adding a bunch of scary mobs into the game.
body:
_Must have been the Wind._ By Cientox and Min01

![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5989eb8a00e5593d7545c259032ddb363ab36d60.png)

_Must have been the Wind._ is a mod aims to add some scary mobs into the game.

It currently adds as of now:
1.0.0- The skinwalker, a mob that disguises itself as any other normal mob, but when you get closer, it will transform and attack you.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DRp-n-gWxNw
<details>
<summary> 1.0.0 The skinwalker </summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b8f4685e3cf089f17c9d4b9601d8faa1c70211b.png)

</details>
